brand.tagline: Hong Kong Draw · International Draw — equal tracks

legal.operatorLine: Hong Kong International Mark Six is operated by {company}
legal.fair1: SHA-256 seed hash published at least 24 hours before each draw
legal.fair2: Raw seed published after the draw for public verification
legal.fair3: Every result is traceable and independently verifiable
legal.responsible: Responsible play: limits and cooling-off mechanisms apply
legal.footerFair: International draws use a verifiable fair system

usage.label: How this page works
usage.homeWhat: Two equal tracks: Hong Kong Draw (Tue/Thu/Sat) and International Draw (daily, seed-verified).
usage.homeHow: Use the cards below or navigation for results, zodiac tools, full rules, and analysis.
usage.hkListWhat: Hong Kong Mark Six schedule results. Wave-colored balls; fixed zodiac display only.
usage.hkListHow: Open a period for six main numbers and the special. Age method is analysis-only.
usage.hkDetailWhat: Six main + one special. Ball color = wave; zodiac = fixed mapping.
usage.hkDetailHow: Links to idiom decode, hidden codes, and trends.
usage.intlListWhat: Daily international draw with pre-published seed hashes; zodiac uses the age method for the draw year (not fixed zodiac).
usage.intlListHow: Verify fairness on each detail page. Legal notice applies to this track.
usage.intlDetailWhat: Same 6+1 format with hash/seed verification; zodiac shown via age method for the draw year.
usage.intlDetailHow: Click verify to confirm SHA-256(seed) matches the published hash.
usage.zodiacWhat: Fixed zodiac, age method (2026), and visual triad/pair/clash diagrams with HD animal icons.
usage.zodiacHow: All numbers shown as wave balls. Diagrams are visual — not plain text tables.
usage.lookupWhat: Number↔zodiac lookup for fixed and age-method mappings.
usage.trendsWhat: Frequency and hot/cold from Hong Kong or International history.
usage.trendsHow: Switch track tab, then read charts and 1–49 grid.
usage.idiomWhat: Decode red-character idioms to suggested zodiac animals.
usage.idiomHow: Enter idiom and decode. Cultural analysis only.
usage.codesWhat: Four codes → age-method zodiac → clash/triad/pair scoring.
usage.codesHow: Enter four numbers and select year.
usage.analysisHubWhat: Idiom and hidden-code tools with sample periods.
usage.analysisHubHow: Match analysis year to the draw year studied.
usage.rulesWhat: Full bilingual rules for Hong Kong standard play and International folk play.
usage.rulesHow: Open Hong Kong or International detail pages below.
usage.rulesHkWhat: HK standard Mark Six: schedule, bet types, zodiac and wave reference.
usage.rulesHkHow: Read basic rules, bet table, zodiac and wave sections.
usage.rulesIntlWhat: Daily draw plus folk extras and legal/fairness requirements.
usage.rulesIntlHow: Read standard bets, folk bets, and legal compliance block.

home.title: Hong Kong International Mark Six
home.subtitle: Hong Kong standard play · International folk play · Legal transparency

results.hkEmptyTitle: Hong Kong results not yet available
results.hkEmptyBody: Hong Kong draw data is manually collected from HKJC official sources only. We never publish fabricated results. This list stays empty until an administrator adds verified draws to draws.json.
results.intlPendingBody: Numbers will be published automatically at UTC 13:30 (Beijing 21:30). Pre-draw seed hash is shown below.

zodiac.title: Zodiac tools
zodiac.ageNote: Age method rotates yearly — hidden-code analysis only.

lookup.title: Zodiac lookup
lookup.inputPrompt: Enter 1-49 to look up {year} age-method zodiac
lookup.emptyPrompt: Enter a number to see your zodiac fortune
lookup.remedyZhi: • Wear red for protection, wear triad (
lookup.remedyChong2: ) accessory, connect with loved ones, stay safe.
lookup.remedyHai2: ) accessories, keep low profile, do good deeds.
lookup.remedyXing: • Manage stress, don't overthink, talk to friends, wear triad accessories.
lookup.remedyHe: Union year — smooth sailing, seize opportunities, go with the flow.
lookup.remedySanhe: Triad year — strong mentor luck, bold moves, career breakthroughs.
lookup.remedyPing: Average year — steady progress, build strength, prepare for next year.

鼠.yearFortune: Stable year with good mentor luck. New career opportunities.

牛.traits: Diligent, determined, loyal, reliable, and patient.
牛.yearFortune: Steady progress. Hard work pays off. Financial luck improves.

虎.traits: Brave, confident, a passionate leader who loves challenges.
虎.yearFortune: Strong momentum — but avoid impulse. Play it safe.

兔.traits: Gentle, thoughtful, peace-loving with refined taste.
兔.yearFortune: Smooth year, good relationships. Expand your network.

龙.traits: Charismatic, talented, confident with natural leadership.
龙.yearFortune: Year of breakthroughs. Helpers and career success.

蛇.traits: Wise, intuitive, deep thinker, mysterious and elegant.
蛇.yearFortune: Best to lie low. Build strength, wait for your moment.

马.yearFortune: Seek wealth through movement. Travel brings chances. Rest well.

羊.traits: Gentle, artistic, empathetic, seeks harmony above all.
羊.yearFortune: Good mentor luck. Steady career growth. Smooth relationships.

猴.traits: Witty, talented, creative, adaptable and versatile.
猴.yearFortune: Many changes — adapt and turn crises into opportunities.

鸡.traits: Sharp, confident, efficient, a natural perfectionist.
鸡.yearFortune: Stand out this year. Talent recognized. Watch your words.

狗.traits: Loyal, responsible, trustworthy with great insight.
狗.yearFortune: Fortune rebounds. Hard work rewarded. Family harmony.

猪.traits: Optimistic, honest, kind, enjoying life with deep luck.
猪.yearFortune: Lucky stars align. Wealth flows. Wishes come true.

glossary.title: Glossary
glossary.subtitle: Core Mark Six terms explained — bilingual reference for beginners

rules.hubIntro: Choose a track for full bilingual rules.
rules.hkCardDesc: HK standard schedule and bet types
rules.intlCardDesc: Daily draw, folk bets, legal & fairness
rules.temaZodiacDesc: Pick the special number's zodiac (12 animals)
rules.mainDesc: Pick any of the six main numbers
rules.twoAllDesc: Two picks both appear among all seven drawn numbers
rules.threeAllDesc: Three picks all appear among the seven numbers
rules.twoSpDesc: Two picks with at least one being the special
rules.comboDesc: One special number + one main number
rules.waveDesc: Red / blue / green wave of the special
rules.sumOddEvenDesc: Sum of tens + units digits of special
rules.head: Head digit
rules.threeWaveDesc: Pick one of red / blue / green wave
rules.fiveElementsDesc: Metal / wood / water / fire / earth zodiac groups
rules.zodiacNote: Each number has a permanent zodiac (01=Rat …)
rules.disclaimer: Information only. No betting or payments on this site. Obey local laws. 18+.
